# Project Progress

## Current Stage

prover

## Stages
- [x] init
- [x] autoformalize
- [ ] prover
- [ ] polish

## End-state overview

**Zero inline `sorry` in the dependency cone of the seven seed declarations + kernel-only
axioms.** Čech-independent leg of the parent's `thm:fga_pic_representability` cone: flat base
change (i=0), generic flatness, and the Quot foundations. Full arc in STRATEGY.md.

## Iter-038 disposition (2 prover lanes + FBC analogist-resolved KEEP)

iter-037 prover outcomes (task_done): GR-E3full CLOSED (3 axiom-clean decls — last matrix gap);
QUOT bridges (I) `isLocalizedModule_of_ringEquiv_semilinear` + (II) `isLocalizedModule_restrictScalars_powers_algebraMap`
landed axiom-clean (Hfr assembly deferred); FBC-A1 assembly pass closed nothing → **tripwire FIRED**.

**Plan-cycle subagents (this iter):**
- **mathlib-analogist `fbc-route-pivot` (cross-domain):** verdict **KEEP** (no pivot). The mate coherence is
  irreducible — `pushforwardBaseChangeMap` is *defined* as the transpose, so every unwinding returns it; the
  geometric counit is not iso, so no module-level (`regroupEquiv`) or geometric-package bypass exists (both
  PIVOTs rejected; no Lean formalization of Stacks 02KH to port). **Key finding:** the feared re-cut cascade
  is ALREADY neutralized — the proof-free conjugate read is built (`codomain_read_legs_param`/`conjPullbackFactor`=`leftAdjointCompIso`/`_legs_conj`/`_conj_eq`),
  `codomain_read_legs` unchanged, `gstar_transpose` consumes the insulated no-legs read. **Sole residual = the
  conjugate-side PROOF of `_legs_conj`** (conj-2b + conj-2d + the single-`conjugateEquiv`-component reframing)
  → a prover round, NOT a refactor. (`analogies/fbc-route-pivot.md`.) Caveat: A2 (second sorry @2348) is
  independent and comparably large.
- **progress-critic `iter038`:** FBC **STUCK** but NO-PROVER+analogist was **CORRECT**; must-fix iter-039 =
  fire a prover on conj-2b/2d (NOT another consult). QUOT **CONVERGING**, GR **CONVERGING**. Dispatch OK.
- **strategy-critic `iter038`:** **CHALLENGE** FBC (process/sunk-cost — "execute the re-cut, don't re-consult")
  — DISPOSITION: overtaken by the in-iter analogist finding that NO re-cut is owed (the conjugate read is
  already built proof-free); the actionable residual is the `_legs_conj` proof, scheduled for iter-039's FBC
  prover. CHALLENGE SNAP (tensor-powers — Mathlib `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory` exists, smaller than
  scoped; noted in STRATEGY, SNAP still gated). Format DRIFT must-fix → STRATEGY cells de-narrativised this iter.
  QUOT/GF/QUOT-repr SOUND.
- **blueprint-reviewer `iter038`:** GrassmannianCells **CLEARS** (E4 complete+correct). QuotScheme **CONDITIONAL
  HOLD** → must-fix pin added this iter (`% LEAN TYPE` for `j ''ᵁ V` in `def:gamma_image_ring_equiv` +
  naturality-API sentence) → now cleared for dispatch. FlatBaseChange coverage block honest, stuck-state
  accurate. All other chapters clean, zero broken edges.
- **Coverage debt (cleared this iter, plan-authored blocks):** QUOT `lem:isLocalizedModule_ringEquiv_semilinear`
  (I) + `lem:isLocalizedModule_restrictScalars_powers_algebraMap` (II); GR `lem:gr_free_entry_eq_signed_minor`
  (pins `exists_minorDet_eq_free_entry`); FBC `lem:base_change_mate_extendScalars_inner_value_counit` (redundant
  variant). Remaining unmatched are `private` → clear on sync.

## Current Objectives

Two parallel prover lanes, import-independent (QuotScheme / GrassmannianCells). **FlatBaseChange: NO prover
this iter** — FBC route KEEP decided; the `_legs_conj` prover round is scheduled for iter-039 (see ramp).

1. **`AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/QuotScheme.lean`** — QUOT-semilin: **build the semilinearity sub-build, then
   chain to Hfr → named descent → gap1.** Blueprint: `chapters/Picard_QuotScheme.tex`
   (`def:gamma_image_ring_equiv`, `lem:gamma_pullback_image_iso_hom_semilinear` — both NEW targets with
   `% LEAN TYPE` pins; the Hfr NOTE after `lem:pullback_gamma_top_iso` + `lem:section_localization_descent`
   give the chain). [prover-mode: mathlib-build]
   - **(1) Build `σ_V` = `gammaImageRingEquiv j V`** : ring iso `Γ(Y, j ''ᵁ V) ≃+* Γ(U, V)` for an open
     immersion `j : U ⟶ Y` (image open is the project operator `j ''ᵁ V`, as in `gammaPullbackImageIso`'s
     signature `Γ(M, f ''ᵁ U)` @1783). `IsOpenImmersion` gives `U ≅ (j ''ᵁ ⊤)`; restrict to `V`, transport
     structure-sheaf sections. Scout `Scheme.Opens.opensRange_ι`, `IsOpenImmersion.isoOfRangeEq`/`isoImage`.
   - **(2) Prove `gammaPullbackImageIso_hom_semilinear`** : `(gammaPullbackImageIso j M V).hom (a • x) =
     σ_V a • (gammaPullbackImageIso j M V).hom x`. The transport is `Functor.mapIso` of
     `(restrictFunctorIsoPullback j).symm.app M`; invoke the `map_smul` field of the underlying
     presheaf-of-modules morphism (`mapPresheaf` component is a module hom over the ring map). **Term-mode
     applied `map_smul` / `mapPresheaf`-naturality, NOT keyed `rw` under the modules instance diamond**
     (memory `fbc-ecancel-collapse-diamond`).
   - **(3) Chain to `Hfr`** : through P1's three pullbacks (`pullback (q.X i).ι`, `pullback ((q.X i).ι ⁻¹ᵁ D(r)).ι`,
     `pullback isoSpec.inv`) + `overRestrictPullbackIso`, compose the per-stage `σ_V`'s into one ring iso, feed
     the composed section isos (as `≃+`) + the bridges (I) `isLocalizedModule_of_ringEquiv_semilinear` (@1667)
     and (II) `isLocalizedModule_restrictScalars_powers_algebraMap` (@1722) + P1's `IsIso fromTildeΓ` +
     `isLocalizedModule_restrict_of_isIso_fromTildeΓ` → assemble `Hfr`, instantiate
     `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen_descent_of_cover` (@1626) at `exists_finite_basicOpen_cover_le_quasicoherentData`
     → close `isLocalizedModule_basicOpen_descent` (named) + gap1 `qcoh_affine_isIso_fromTildeΓ`.
   - mathlib-build discipline: axiom-clean, NO sorry; build (1) then (2) bottom-up; if the chain (3) is too
     large this iter, land (1)+(2) axiom-clean and hand off a precise (3) decomposition. **Do NOT** apply (I)
     with `σ := (R_r ≅ R)` (R_r and R are NOT isomorphic — the `σ_V`'s are between section rings of
     isomorphic opens; the R_r→R descent is (II)'s job). **Out of scope:** the 4 protected stubs; G1-core;
     annihilator characterization; SNAP.

2. **`AlgebraicJacobian/Picard/GrassmannianCells.lean`** — GR-E4: **scaffold + build the filler
   `existence_lift`** (NEW decl — this 0-sorry file needs the scaffold keyword on this line to pass the no-op
   filter `sorry_count.py`). Blueprint: `chapters/Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex` (`lem:gr_existence_lift` @~2405,
   concrete LEAN SIGNATURE comment + full top/bottom-triangle proof sketch; deps all DONE — frontier-ready).
   [prover-mode: mathlib-build]
   - **Build target:** `existence_lift` = the diagonal filler `ℓ := Spec.map (CommRingCat.ofHom g') ≫
     (theGlueData d r).ι J` of the valuative square. Assemble a `CommSq.LiftStruct`:
     - **Top triangle** from E1 `existence_chart_factorization` + `g = (algebraMap R K) ∘ g'`
       (`existence_factor_through_valuationRing`, @~1789) + `ι_toSpecZ` — restricting `ℓ` along `Spec(R→K)`
       gives `Spec(g) ≫ ι_J = i₁`.
     - **Bottom triangle** from `specZIsTerminal.hom_ext` (both legs land in terminal `Spec ℤ`).
     - Conclude `HasLift` / the lift structure for the valuative square.
   - mathlib-build discipline: axiom-clean, NO sorry. If the `CommSq.LiftStruct` assembly is genuinely
     blocked, build the two triangles as standalone lemmas + hand off. **Out of scope:** E5
     `valuativeExistence_toSpecZ` + `isProper` (downstream — follow once E4 lands); GR-quot/GR-repr.

## Iter-039 ramp

- **FBC (route KEEP — prover round, NOT a consult).** Dispatch a fine-grained FBC prover on the `_legs_conj`
  proof: (1) build conj-2b `base_change_mate_reindex_conj_pullbackLeg` standalone
  (`Adjunction.conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_inv` + `Scheme.Modules.conjugateEquiv_pullbackComp_inv`);
  (2) build conj-2d `base_change_mate_reindex_conj_crossLayer` (`unit_conjugateEquiv_symm` raised by
  `conjugateEquiv_comp`); (3) the single-`conjugateEquiv`-component reframing → `.injective`/`.surjective`
  discharge of `_legs_conj` (sorry @1700), which makes `inner_value_eq` axiom-clean and closes
  `gstar_transpose`. Recipe: `analogies/fbc-route-pivot.md` (ordering) + `analogies/fbc-mate-reencode.md`
  (conjugate-component idiom). Both conj-2b/conj-2d are leandag frontier-ready (blueprint blocks exist).
- **FBC A2** — after `gstar_transpose` closes: run an **api-alignment** mathlib-analogist consult on
  locality-of-`IsIso` for `SheafOfModules` maps on a basis (the @2348 affine reduction), THEN open the A2
  build (needs a blueprint section + decomposition first — dispatch a blueprint-writer/dag-walker).
- **QUOT** — if semilinearity + Hfr land: gap1 closes ⟹ unblocks G1-core + GF-G1 + annihilator forward
  direction. Next QUOT-defs sub-build: P2 rank-`r` local-freeness. If only (1)+(2) land, iter-039 = the (3)
  Hfr chain.
- **GR** — if E4 lands: dispatch E5 (`valuativeExistence_toSpecZ`) → `isProper` closes (the
  `isProper_of_valuativeExistence` reduction @~1531 is in place). Then GR-quot, GR-repr.
- **GF** — gated on gap1 (QUOT semilinearity/Hfr); once gap1 lands, G1 → G3 → `genericFlatness` (also needs
  the flagged `gf_torsion_reindex` OreLocalization fix before the lane opens).

## Standing notes

- **Import architecture:** root `AlgebraicJacobian.lean` imports each leaf; provers add decls to EXISTING
  files only. The 2 lanes are import-independent (QuotScheme / GrassmannianCells).
- **No LLM API key in env** — `archon-informal-agent.py` unavailable (the `GEMINI_CLI_*` vars are the IDE
  bridge, not `GEMINI_API_KEY`); use blueprint + Mathlib search + the analogist subagent.
- **Build state:** all modules GREEN. FBC 4 sorries: `_legs_conj` @1700 (the LIVE conjugate-side target for
  iter-039), `gstar_transpose` @2167 (closes once `_legs_conj` lands), A2 affine reduction @2348 (independent,
  gated), `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso` @2370 (Čech leg, gated). QUOT 4 protected stubs (semilinearity is
  NEW infrastructure). GR/GHS/FBCGlobal 0. GF 6 (gated). Verify with `lake build <module>`, NOT
  `lake env lean <file>` (memory `lake-build-vs-env-lean-spurious-errors`); `touch` before a verifying build
  if the sorry landscape looks stale.
- **FBC routing (do-not-retry):** route KEEP (no pivot — mate coherence irreducible, both module-level and
  geometric-package bypasses rejected). The proof-free conjugate read is ALREADY built; NO refactor cascade.
  Close `_legs_conj` on the conjugate side (conj-2b + conj-2d + single-`conjugateEquiv`-component reframing).
  NOT element-`ext` (dead-end @2097). NOT conj-2a section-composite reframing (abandoned). NOT keyed
  `rw`/`simp`/`erw` on the `X.Modules` diamond (memories `fbc-ecancel-collapse-diamond`,
  `fbc-subst-legs-literal-form-lock`). FBC targets are `IsIso(pushforwardBaseChangeMap)`.
- **QUOT do-not-retry:** bundled `DirectSum.Decomposition`/`IsInternal` over a quotient/subtype carrier is a
  hard `isDefEq` dead end (memory `graded-quotient-module-isdefeq-pathology`). The open-immersion
  `pullback`-unit-iso is NOT `Final` (use the iso route — P1 step-4, DONE). `gammaPullbackImageIso` via
  `Functor.mapIso` of `restrictFunctorIsoPullback.symm.app M` — `asIso (φ.app U)` fails `IsIso` synthesis.
  Do NOT apply bridge (I) with `σ := (R_r ≅ R)` (not isomorphic).
- **GR do-not-retry:** `Matrix.det_updateColumn` does NOT exist (column-substituted-identity det = `v p`, no
  sign, via `cramer_apply`+`mulVec_cramer`); `.J` projection blocks `Finite` inferInstance (explicit `haveI`);
  `IsOpenImmersion (ι I)` needs explicit `@`-instance; field `Spec` is `Subsingleton`+`Nonempty`.
- **Merge-back discipline:** never rename kept decls/labels/paths; never add `\leanok` by hand.
  `archon-protected.yaml` has only commented entries. Advisory intended-freeze (`genericFlatness`,
  `affineBaseChange_pushforward_iso`, `flatBaseChange_pushforward_isIso`, `QuotFunctor`): keep SIGNATURES

- **STRATEGY hygiene owed:** a focused trim pass (16.5KB → ~12KB target) is owed — non-blocking; defer to an

# Iter 038 — Plan (Quot-Foundations)

## TL;DR

iter-037 fired the FBC tripwire (assembly pass closed nothing). This iter resolved the FBC route at the
strategic level (KEEP, via a sharpened cross-domain analogist), cleared the blueprint gate for two prover
lanes, cleared the public coverage debt (4 plan-written blocks), and dispatched **2 parallel import-independent
prover lanes** — FBC gets NO prover this iter (the analogist consult was the tripwire-correct action; the
`_legs_conj` prover round is scheduled for iter-039):

1. **QUOT-semilin** [mathlib-build] — build `gammaImageRingEquiv` (σ_V) + `gammaPullbackImageIso_hom_semilinear`,
   then chain through P1's pullbacks + bridges (I)/(II) to assemble `Hfr` → close gap1.
2. **GR-E4** [mathlib-build, scaffold] — build the valuative-criterion filler `existence_lift` (frontier-ready).

## Decision made — FBC: KEEP the conjugate route; the residual is a PROOF, not a refactor

- **Option chosen:** dispatch the tripwire-mandated mathlib-analogist (cross-domain), but SHARPENED — not
  "find the reframing" (already in `analogies/fbc-mate-reencode.md`, iter-034) but "is the conjugate
  re-encoding the lowest-cost path, or does a Mathlib-precedented route bypass `gstar_transpose` entirely?"
  Then schedule a focused `_legs_conj` prover round for iter-039.
- **Why (over re-running the literal tripwire OR a blind refactor):** the analogist returned IN-ITER with two
  decisive findings: (a) **KEEP** — the mate coherence is irreducible (`pushforwardBaseChangeMap` is *defined*
  as the transpose; the geometric counit is not iso; both PIVOTs — module-level `regroupEquiv`, geometric
  base-change package — evaluated and rejected, no Lean 02KH to port); (b) **the feared refactor cascade is
  already neutralized** — the proof-free conjugate read is built (`codomain_read_legs_param` /
  `conjPullbackFactor`=`leftAdjointCompIso` / `_legs_conj` / `_conj_eq`), `codomain_read_legs` unchanged,
  `gstar_transpose` insulated. So the sole residual is the conjugate-side PROOF of `_legs_conj` (conj-2b +
  conj-2d + the single-`conjugateEquiv`-component reframing) — a prover round, exactly what the progress-critic
  named as the iter-039 must-fix.
- **LOC/risk:** iter-039 FBC round ~80–150 LOC, fine-grained; conj-2b/conj-2d are leandag frontier-ready with
  blueprint blocks; the reframing is the one genuinely-hard node. Risk: the reframing may still resist —
  but there is no cheaper route (PIVOTs rejected on first principles, not effort).
- **Cheapest reversal signal:** if the iter-039 `_legs_conj` round lands conj-2b/2d but cannot do the
  reframing, the conjugate component idiom is genuinely exhausted → escalate to a refactor that rebuilds the
  whole `_legs` comparison from `leftAdjointCompIso` primitives (the analogist's contained-cascade shape),
  not another prover round.

## Disposition of critic verdicts (no silent overrides)

- **progress-critic `iter038` — FBC STUCK (must-fix: iter-039 prover on conj-2b/2d, NOT another consult).**
  ACCEPTED. PROGRESS iter-039 ramp + task_pending schedule exactly that. The critic confirmed this iter's
  NO-PROVER+analogist was the correct response to the fired tripwire. QUOT/GR CONVERGING — proceed.
- **strategy-critic `iter038` — FBC CHALLENGE ("execute the re-cut, don't re-consult — sunk cost").**
  OVERTAKEN, not rebutted. The critic's premise was that the iter-034 re-cut sits unexecuted and the planner
  was commissioning another consult instead of acting. The in-iter analogist established that NO re-cut is
  owed (the proof-free conjugate read is ALREADY built; `codomain_read_legs` is insulated). So the critic's
  recommended action (run the re-cut as a spike) is moot; the genuine actionable residual is the `_legs_conj`
  PROOF, which is scheduled as iter-039's FBC prover round (an action, not a consult). The "module-level via
  `regroupEquiv`" alternative the critic also flagged as a non-escape is confirmed rejected by the analogist.
- **strategy-critic SNAP CHALLENGE (tensor-powers under-decomposed; Mathlib `PresheafOfModules.monoidalCategory`
  exists).** ADDRESSED by noting the Mathlib mitigant in STRATEGY `## Mathlib gaps`; SNAP stays gated on gap1 +
  Open Q1, so the concrete sub-phase decomposition is owed when SNAP opens, not this iter.
- **strategy-critic format DRIFT (must-fix).** FIXED: STRATEGY cells de-narrativised (removed `@0NN`/`iter-0NN`/
  `LIVE @` leakage; FBC-A1 Status reduced to bare `STUCK`); FBC route paragraph + Q2 rewritten to the KEEP
  state. Byte size (16.5KB) still over the ~12KB target — a focused cell-trim is owed (non-blocking, logged).
- **blueprint-reviewer `iter038` — QuotScheme CONDITIONAL HOLD.** RESOLVED same-iter: added the `% LEAN TYPE`
  pin for `j ''ᵁ V` in `def:gamma_image_ring_equiv` + a sentence naming the `map_smul` naturality API in the
  semilinearity proof. Reviewer pre-cleared dispatch contingent on the pin ⇒ QUOT lane dispatches this iter.
  GrassmannianCells CLEARS; FlatBaseChange honest (no prover).

## Blueprint work this iter (plan-authored, math-only)

- **Picard_QuotScheme.tex:** coverage blocks `lem:isLocalizedModule_ringEquiv_semilinear` (I),
  `lem:isLocalizedModule_restrictScalars_powers_algebraMap` (II); NEW prover targets
  `def:gamma_image_ring_equiv` (σ_V, with `% LEAN TYPE` pin) + `lem:gamma_pullback_image_iso_hom_semilinear`;
  wired all into `lem:section_localization_descent`'s `\uses{}`.
- **Picard_GrassmannianCells.tex:** coverage block `lem:gr_free_entry_eq_signed_minor` (pins
  `exists_minorDet_eq_free_entry`); wired into `lem:gr_existence_factor_through_valuation_ring`'s `\uses{}`.
- **Cohomology_FlatBaseChange.tex:** coverage block `lem:base_change_mate_extendScalars_inner_value_counit`
  (redundant variant of `gstar_generator_close`).

## Subagent skips

- **blueprint-clean:** skipped — this iter's blueprint edits are plan-authored coverage blocks + two
  prover-target blocks following the chapter's existing `\mathrm{}`/`% LEAN TYPE` conventions; the
  blueprint-reviewer (dispatched, whole-blueprint) carried the purity check and flagged only minor `%`-comment
  verbosity (non-blocking) — no separate purity pass warranted.

## Soundness check (cheap disprove pass)

- **QUOT semilinearity** — not a false-statement risk: for an open immersion `j`, `j ''ᵁ V` and `V` have
  canonically isomorphic structure sheaves (`IsOpenImmersion` ⟹ iso onto image), and the pullback module's
  sections transform semilinearly over that ring iso; standard, true. Variance confirmed sensible by the
  blueprint-reviewer (covariant on module sections, contragredient on the ring action).
- **GR E4** — `existence_lift` has a full top/bottom-triangle proof sketch + concrete LEAN SIGNATURE; all 5
  deps `\leanok`; frontier-ready. No disprove concern.
